acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Hosted macOS CI installs `jq` explicitly alongside the Homebrew-managed tools needed by `just macos-check`.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml contains `brew install jq swiftformat swiftlint` immediately before `just macos-check`.
The workflow diff changes only the macOS Homebrew install command, with no flake or Linux job edits.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Workflow syntax and repo hygiene checks pass.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: actionlint and git diff whitespace validation passed; qd report and full check validation are recorded in evidence/m4-macos-ci-jq-tooling/commands.log.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records workflow validation and qd reports.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Workflow validation is recorded in evidence/m4-macos-ci-jq-tooling/commands.log; completion and audit reports are present under reports/qd/m4-macos-ci-jq-tooling/.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The notes and reports describe CI tooling only.

realWorldValidation.evidence: No live hosted run is required for this CI configuration node; local workflow syntax and repository gates validate the scoped change.
